name: Electerm
tagline: A modern terminal and SSH/SFTP client
description: Electerm is an open source, cross-platform terminal application that integrates SSH, SFTP, serial port, and local shell access into a single graphical interface for developers and system administrators.

features.title: Terminal emulator
features.description: Provides a full-featured local shell terminal with tabbed sessions.

features.title: SSH client
features.description: Connect to remote servers over SSH with saved profiles and key support.

features.title: SFTP client
features.description: Browse, upload, and download files from remote servers using SFTP.

features.title: Serial port support
features.description: Connect to and manage devices over serial ports directly from the app.

features.title: Session management
features.description: Save, organize, and quickly access connection profiles and histories.

features.title: Multi-tab interface
features.description: Work with multiple terminals and connections simultaneously in tabs.

features.title: Theming and customization
features.description: Customize appearance, fonts, and colors for the terminal interface.

features.title: Cross-platform support
features.description: Runs consistently on Windows, macOS, and Linux systems.
